title: EoE People in the Theatre
wikitext:
[]: EoE People in the Theatre             Quote Post by Godai » Sun Nov 17, 2024 8:54 am I've just finished re-watching the EoE since I had a few empty gaps in my head that I needed to fill with the answers. Through the end, there was 2-3 minutes of irl scenes that I somehow understood except the theatre part. Is that from the time when people were watching the EoE in the theatres for the first time? if so was this part "irl" added after the theatre release? And if not, did they just record the people who watch a random show there and include in the movie lol?

[]: Re: EoE People in the Theatre             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 17, 2024 12:57 pm IIRC, it was a showing of Death and Rebirth , not a case where they developed and spliced the reel during the opening performance of EoE.

[]: Re: EoE People in the Theatre             Quote Post by Godai » Sun Nov 17, 2024 3:49 pm Ah I see! I had no idea that Death and Rebirth was in the theatres as well. Thank you, Mr. Tines! And thank you for supporting the decades-old Eva forum without giving up. I am grateful for people like you who continue exiting around the old internet forums that make some of us still feel alive in today's corrupt soulless bot-filled social media cesspool.

Article: EoE People in the Theatre
[]: EoE People in the Theatre             Quote Post by Godai » Sun Nov 17, 2024 8:54 am I've just finished re-watching the EoE since I had a few empty gaps in my head that I needed to fill with the answers. Through the end, there was 2-3 minutes of irl scenes that I somehow understood except the theatre part. Is that from the time when people were watching the EoE in the theatres for the first time? if so was this part "irl" added after the theatre release? And if not, did they just record the people who watch a random show there and include in the movie lol?

[]: Re: EoE People in the Theatre             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 17, 2024 12:57 pm IIRC, it was a showing of Death and Rebirth , not a case where they developed and spliced the reel during the opening performance of EoE.

[]: Re: EoE People in the Theatre             Quote Post by Godai » Sun Nov 17, 2024 3:49 pm Ah I see! I had no idea that Death and Rebirth was in the theatres as well. Thank you, Mr. Tines! And thank you for supporting the decades-old Eva forum without giving up. I am grateful for people like you who continue exiting around the old internet forums that make some of us still feel alive in today's corrupt soulless bot-filled social media cesspool.
